title: Add custom snippet to Trip Pilot AI website

requirements.text: Add the user-provided custom code snippet to the Trip Pilot AI website. Since the snippet content was not included in the message, prompt the user to paste or share the snippet so it can be correctly embedded in the appropriate location (e.g., index.html head/body, a specific page component, or AdBanner component).

quotes: please add the following snippet to the new revised website here it is.

acceptanceCriteria: The snippet is embedded in the correct location in the frontend codebase
The site builds and renders without errors after the snippet is added
The snippet is visible/active as intended (e.g., script executes, ad unit renders, widget appears)

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Preserve all existing AdSense configuration in frontend/index.html
nonGoals: Changing any backend logic or data models
